records.m_Talk_ENG: Case 37. Subject code B2-1.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Case 37. Subject code B2-1.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Case 37. Subject code B2-1.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The subject's Corruption resistance is slightly above average and is classified as a non-Counter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The subject's Corruption resistance is slightly above average and is classified as a non-Counter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The subject's Corruption resistance is slightly above average and is classified as a non-Counter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, she was the only subject who did not show any side effects to the extract Midnight Type D, while showing high responses to the 6 reagents tested previously.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, she was the only subject who did not show any side effects to the extract Midnight Type D, while showing high responses to the 6 reagents tested previously.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, she was the only subject who did not show any side effects to the extract Midnight Type D, while showing high responses to the 6 reagents tested previously.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In this test, I will be administering the blood sample directly to her instead of a reagent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In this test, I will be administering the blood sample directly to her instead of a reagent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In this test, I will be administering the blood sample directly to her instead of a reagent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If she lives... it will be a great turning point for the project.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If she lives... it will be a great turning point for the project.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If she lives... it will be a great turning point for the project.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Come and sit down, B2-1.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Come and sit down, B2-1.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Come and sit down, B2-1.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, step back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, step back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, step back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How do you feel?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How do you feel?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How do you feel?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A little hot, but... nothing I can't handle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A little hot, but... nothing I can't handle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A little hot, but... nothing I can't handle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be able to... take all future injections.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be able to... take all future injections.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be able to... take all future injections.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... so...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... so...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... so...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Please don't touch my broth
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Please don't touch my broth
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Please don't touch my broth
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...! Urgh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...! Urgh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...! Urgh...

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vShe's recovering. Impressive.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vShe's recovering. Impressive.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vShe's recovering. Impressive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: B2-1. Get up and move around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: B2-1. Get up and move around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: B2-1. Get up and move around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It hurts...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It hurts...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It hurts...

records.m_Talk_ENG: On your feet. Now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: On your feet. Now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: On your feet. Now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: It went right through her lungs, but she's already recovered enough to breathe. This is far beyond our expectations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It went right through her lungs, but she's already recovered enough to breathe. This is far beyond our expectations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It went right through her lungs, but she's already recovered enough to breathe. This is far beyond our expectations.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
We should now test the regeneration of vital organs, including the brain, as well as the effect duration of the blood sample
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
We should now test the regeneration of vital organs, including the brain, as well as the effect duration of the blood sample
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
We should now test the regeneration of vital organs, including the brain, as well as the effect duration of the blood sample
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need... something to drink...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need... something to drink...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need... something to drink...

records.m_Talk_ENG: B2-1! Stand back! What do you think you're doing?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: B2-1! Stand back! What do you think you're doing?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: B2-1! Stand back! What do you think you're doing?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm thirsty... I can't stand it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm thirsty... I can't stand it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm thirsty... I can't stand it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Situation room! Release the gas!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Situation room! Release the gas!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Situation room! Release the gas!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bring the guards! Apprehend her!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bring the guards! Apprehend her!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bring the guards! Apprehend her!

records.m_Talk_ENG: AAAAARGH!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: AAAAARGH!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: AAAAARGH!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It says it's experiment footage, but it looks like a snuff film to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It says it's experiment footage, but it looks like a snuff film to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It says it's experiment footage, but it looks like a snuff film to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looking at the background, it doesn't look like it was filmed in the basement.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looking at the background, it doesn't look like it was filmed in the basement.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looking at the background, it doesn't look like it was filmed in the basement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some of the scientists at the Northern Union have continued to conduct experiments to analyze strange mutants who have been exposed to abnormal phenomena.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some of the scientists at the Northern Union have continued to conduct experiments to analyze strange mutants who have been exposed to abnormal phenomena.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some of the scientists at the Northern Union have continued to conduct experiments to analyze strange mutants who have been exposed to abnormal phenomena.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although there are no official statistics, intel from within suggests that there may still be many of these test facilities remaining.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although there are no official statistics, intel from within suggests that there may still be many of these test facilities remaining.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although there are no official statistics, intel from within suggests that there may still be many of these test facilities remaining.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That girl in the gown looks familiar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That girl in the gown looks familiar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That girl in the gown looks familiar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think so too, Administrator?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think so too, Administrator?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think so too, Administrator?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It reminded me of someone with a similar voice and facial structures as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It reminded me of someone with a similar voice and facial structures as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It reminded me of someone with a similar voice and facial structures as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It's probably a coincidence. For she had no ties with the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It's probably a coincidence. For she had no ties with the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It's probably a coincidence. For she had no ties with the Northern Union.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Check the latter part of the video
records.m_Talk_DEU: Check the latter part of the video
records.m_Talk_FRA: Check the latter part of the video

records.m_Talk_ENG: The subtitles at the end seem to have been edited.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The subtitles at the end seem to have been edited.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The subtitles at the end seem to have been edited.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It says, <color=#ffd34c>"Do not bring angered Shadows into the witch's yard."</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: It says, <color=#ffd34c>"Do not bring angered Shadows into the witch's yard."</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: It says, <color=#ffd34c>"Do not bring angered Shadows into the witch's yard."</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: It looks like they put in the wrong subtitles.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It looks like they put in the wrong subtitles.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It looks like they put in the wrong subtitles.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or could this be a cryptic message the Senior left for us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or could this be a cryptic message the Senior left for us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or could this be a cryptic message the Senior left for us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Without knowing what the intent was, we cannot rule out that possibility.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Without knowing what the intent was, we cannot rule out that possibility.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Without knowing what the intent was, we cannot rule out that possibility.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Check the title of the video
records.m_Talk_DEU: Check the title of the video
records.m_Talk_FRA: Check the title of the video

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think the numbering in the titles of the videos indicates the order to watch them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think the numbering in the titles of the videos indicates the order to watch them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think the numbering in the titles of the videos indicates the order to watch them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if we sort the titles by their last edited date...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if we sort the titles by their last edited date...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if we sort the titles by their last edited date...

records.m_Talk_ENG: These are... coordinates to a dimensional route.
records.m_Talk_DEU: These are... coordinates to a dimensional route.
records.m_Talk_FRA: These are... coordinates to a dimensional route.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It's strange, but it's hard to ignore it considering it's our only hint.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It's strange, but it's hard to ignore it considering it's our only hint.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It's strange, but it's hard to ignore it considering it's our only hint.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It looks like hyperdepths coordinates, but it's hard to confirm without a dimensional ship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It looks like hyperdepths coordinates, but it's hard to confirm without a dimensional ship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It looks like hyperdepths coordinates, but it's hard to confirm without a dimensional ship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Collect and secure all the test videos you've found as evidence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Collect and secure all the test videos you've found as evidence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Collect and secure all the test videos you've found as evidence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll leave the analysis of the coordinates to the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll leave the analysis of the coordinates to the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll leave the analysis of the coordinates to the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, let's split up again and look for traces of Jackson...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, let's split up again and look for traces of Jackson...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, let's split up again and look for traces of Jackson...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. Something doesn't feel right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. Something doesn't feel right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. Something doesn't feel right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doesn't feel right? Are you sensing a ghost's gaze?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doesn't feel right? Are you sensing a ghost's gaze?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't feel right? Are you sensing a ghost's gaze?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Nothing like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Nothing like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Nothing like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because ghosts don't make the ground shake by running.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because ghosts don't make the ground shake by running.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because ghosts don't make the ground shake by running.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Multiple large C.O.s detected.
